positive: A whimsical, highly detailed illustration of a stylized celestial fox (kitsune) sitting among bioluminescent cherry blossoms. The fox should have an elegant, slightly ethereal silhouette, rendered in bold line art with vibrant pops of color (deep teal, amethyst purple, gold leaf accents). Composition should be centered and balanced, designed for a t-shirt print, with plenty of negative space around the edges. High contrast, intricate details, mystical aesthetic, vector art style, glowing accents, japanese folklore influence, digital painting, flat illustration.
